name: Suffolk Fish Pie (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (Mark 5).
2. Cook the fish in a saucepan with milk, seasoning to taste. Reserve the milk and flake the fish.
3. Butter a deep pie dish that is 2 to 2 1/2 pints and place the fish into it.
4. Slice the hard-boiled eggs and arrange them on top of the fish.
5. Melt the butter in the saucepan, then stir in the flour. Add the reserved milk and cook, stirring, until thickened.
6. Stir in the parsley and capers, then season to taste.
7. Pour this sauce over the fish and eggs.
8. Cover with mashed potatoes, roughing them up lightly with a fork. Add a little butter and bake for 30 minutes or until the potato is lightly browned.
9. Serve with vegetables such as buttered spinach. Optionally, add a layer of sliced tomato on top of the fish before adding the potato topping.
